name: Third party truck hit me at work in South Salt Lake, sue them?

mainEntity.name: Third party truck hit me at work in South Salt Lake, sue them?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, pursue workers' comp plus separate negligence suit against third party.**[3]

Comp covers basics; sue at-fault outsider for full damages including pain/suffering.

- 4-year statute for PI.[2]
- Comparative fault applies (under 50%).[2]
- Credit comp benefits received.

File both tracks. Attorney coordinates.
